This directory vendors a minimal subset of Zotero source files needed to
initialize a local Zotero-compatible SQLite database schema for conversion
scripts in this repository.

Upstream project:
- https://github.com/zotero/zotero

Vendored from upstream clone at:
- local path: /tmp/zotero-src
- files copied:
  - resource/schema/userdata.sql
  - resource/schema/system.sql
  - resource/schema/system-107.sql
  - resource/schema/triggers.sql
  - COPYING

License:
- Zotero source code is licensed under GNU Affero General Public License v3.
- See COPYING in this directory.
